modules.name: Linux Foundations
modules.description: Establish baseline knowledge and introduce Linux through contrast with Windows.

lessons.title: Operating System Concepts & Introduction to Linux
File Systems, Partitions, and Permissions
topics: Windows NTFS vs Linux ext4 permissions

modules.name: System Management
modules.description: Core administrative tasks across users, processes, software, and networking.

lessons.title: User and Group Management
topics: Creating/modifying users and groups in Linux

lessons.title: Managing Processes and Services
topics: Windows Task Manager and services comparison

lessons.title: Networking Tools and Configuration
topics: Compare with Windows network tools (ipconfig, netsh)

modules.name: Automation, Containers & Scripting
modules.description: Scripting, automation tools, and intro to containerized systems.

lessons.title: Bash Scripting and Shell Automation
topics: Creating reusable scripts for admin tasks

lessons.title: Git, Containers, and Infrastructure as Code
topics: Version control with Git: clone, commit, push
Basic Docker usage: pull, run, build
Introduction to IaC (e.g., Ansible, Terraform overview)

modules.name: Security & Troubleshooting
modules.description: Protecting and fixing Linux systems using best practices.

lessons.title: Linux Security and Firewalls
topics: Managing firewalls with ufw or firewalld
SSH keys and secure remote access
Compare Windows firewall and RDP access

lessons.title: Troubleshooting Linux Systems
topics: Diagnosing storage, memory, CPU, and service issues
